Organizer

The host of the awards is Laka Foundation (KRS: 0000639902, EU VAT No. PL6381817438, Poland), a nonprofit and nongovernmental organization. Contact person: Damian Przybyła,  damian@designeducates.com, address: Stanisława Konarskiego 18c, 44-100 Gliwice, Poland.  The official website of the awards (www.designeducates.com) includes information about the theme, awards, jury, schedule, fees, submission requirements, and awards ceremony. Contact the organizer at hello@des
